nasb.text: Jesus answered, “I do not have a demon; but I honor My Father, and you dishonor Me.

esv.text: Jesus answered, “I do not have a demon, but I honor my Father, and you dishonor me.

cnv.text: 耶穌回答：“我不是鬼附的。我尊敬我的父，你們卻侮辱我。

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“我没有被鬼附身。我尊敬我的父，你们却侮辱我。

csbs.text: 耶稣回答：“我没有鬼魔附身。我尊重我的父，你们却侮辱我。
